name: rust-lsp
description: Expose rust-analyzer over MCP for semantic Rust navigation and editing workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Rust Analyzer tools for semantic code navigation
interface.longDescription: Add rust-analyzer backed MCP tools and a bundled skill so Codex can inspect Rust workspaces semantically, resolve definitions and references, inspect inferred types, and apply safe rename workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use rust-analyzer to find the definition and references of this Rust symbol.
Inspect the inferred type at this cursor position in my Rust workspace.
Rename this Rust symbol safely across the workspace.
